daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Cap. You're giving main character energy without even trying. Trust the quiet confidence building inside you—it's about to become impossible to ignore.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a softness in your vibe that's magnetic rn. Someone might notice. More importantly, *you* might notice how worthy you actually are of good things.
daily.career: Your ideas have more weight than usual. Speak up in that meeting or slide into that DM you've been overthinking. The universe is basically giving you a gentle nudge to claim your space.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today. Skip the punishment workouts and lean into movement that feels good—a walk, stretching, whatever makes you feel alive rather than drained. Recovery is underrated.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of introspection this week, Cap. It's giving major clarity energy—perfect for sorting through what actually matters vs. what's just noise. Trust your gut instincts; they're sharper than usual.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is about authenticity over performance. If you've been holding back how you really feel, the stars are whispering it's time. Vulnerability hits different when you mean it.
weekly.career: Your work energy is steady and grounded—exactly your vibe. This week favors strategic thinking over big moves. Organize your vision, align your efforts with your actual goals. Small intentional steps compound into real momentum.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Tune in to what actually energizes you instead of pushing through what drains you. Rest isn't laziness; it's data about what your system needs.
